title: legousia speculum-veneris
intro: Legousia speculum-veneris, also known as Venus glass or mirror flower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, Legousia speculum-veneris has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Legousia speculum-veneris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
